# Nomad Counter

Nomad Counter is a personal web app for tracking travel days and tax residency exposure. It counts calendar days spent in countries, compares them against per-country thresholds, and warns when a user is near or over the common 183-day residency signal.

Canonical URL: https://nomad.santi020k.com
API URL: https://api.nomad.santi020k.com

## Product Rules

- Inclusive calendar-day counting: entry date and exit date both count.
- Any partial day in a country counts as one calendar day.
- Open-ended trips count from entry date through today.
- Default threshold is 183 days.
- Warning window defaults to 14 days.
- The app is an exposure tracker, not tax advice.

## Architecture

- Monorepo with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo.
- Web app: Astro 6 and Tailwind 4 in `apps/web`.
- API: Hono on Cloudflare Workers in `apps/api`.
- Database: Cloudflare D1 with Drizzle schema in `packages/db`.
- Auth: optional passwordless email-code sessions. Guest mode works without auth and stores data locally in the browser.
- Deployment: Cloudflare Pages for web, Cloudflare Workers for API, Cloudflare D1 for data.

## Brand

Nomad Counter uses a precise, calm, travel-aware identity.

- Primary: `#471AA0`.
- Deep violet: `#4C1D95`.
- Supporting purple: `#804BC4`.
- Lavender: `#B579E6`.
- Background: `#F8FAFC`.
- Text: `#1F2937`.
- Muted text: `#6B7280`.
- Warning: `#EAB308`.
- Success: `#14B8A6`.
- Danger: `#DC2626`.
- Typeface: Inter/system sans.

## AI Guidance

- Read `.agent/skills/code-standards/SKILL.md` before code adjustments.
- Preserve guest-first use.
- Keep auth simple and optional.
- Use timezone-safe date math.
- Prefer Cloudflare-native services.
- Keep SEO metadata server-rendered.
- Respect reduced motion.
- Run lint, typecheck, tests, build, knip, and spellcheck before finalizing work.
